description_long: This object consists of a large, flat widescreen computer monitor with a thin, black bezel and a matte blue display surface. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular pedestal stand with a wide, flat base, providing stability. In front of the monitor sits a full-sized keyboard with a standard key layout and a separate numeric keypad, both rendered in black with gray keycaps. A compact, rectangular mouse is positioned to the right of the keyboard, matching the color scheme. The rear of the monitor is angular and features a geometric design, with no visible ports or branding. The overall appearance is modern and minimalistic, suitable for office or home desk environments.
description: A modern widescreen computer monitor with a thin black bezel, accompanied by a matching keyboard and mouse. The setup features a sleek, angular stand and a matte blue display.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the monitor, the depth of the stand, and the keyboard and mouse layout.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide blue display, thin bezel, and full keyboard with mouse to the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the monitor's slimness and the arrangement of the keyboard and mouse.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the angular, geometric back of the monitor and the broad, flat base of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and black with a matte finish, featuring sharp corners and no visible decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a wide, flat base and a vertical support column, all in black plastic or metal with a matte finish. No visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear of the monitor.
